meaning: v.鎵硅瘎,鍚规瘺姹傜柕,闈為毦
examples: This isn't really what my wife is trying to criticise me about.
Health experts regularly criticise them severely for selling food that makes people fat.
Otherwise, academics will continue to think dangerously alike, increasingly detached from the societies which they study, investigate and criticise.
We can criticise the teams he picks at times - but he always comes out on top.
They are freer to criticise the Tigers than they would be in Sri Lanka.
